paper_focus.title: Fe–Mn–C–Al Low-Density Steel for Structural Materials: A Review of Alloying, Heat Treatment, Microstructure, and Mechanical Properties
paper_focus.research_objective: To review and discuss the effects of alloying and heat treatment on the microstructure evolution and resulting mechanical properties of Al-containing Fe–Mn–C–Al low-density steel, aiming to provide guidance for high-quality low-density steel design.
